decisions.rationale: Valid ir-fidelity gap: multi-high join permutation follows LOAD_SIGNAL_QUESTIONS field order (cognitive → relational → environmental → financial) rather than bTIBO plus_element chain order (cognitive → environmental → financial → relational). Branch selection, high_intensity_text labels, and nervous-system suffix all match bTIAw; only display-string ordering differs for three- and four-high cases. criteria_audit AC-1 passes on three-branch logic and label content; API-04-behavioral-fingerprint depends_on gate needs a computed pressure_profile_text, not list permutation parity. Localized fix in buildPressureProfile.ts + buildPressureProfile.test.ts can land in a follow-on parity patch without blocking API-04 advance.

Confirmed integration gap: classification.ts and assignAiCoachingModes.ts still gate on legacy prototype bucket literal "System Overload" while API-03 now writes Bubble-parity descriptive strings (e.g. "Cognitive Overload + … + Wired Nervous System"). API-03 AC-2 is satisfied — calculateUserPressureProfile patches pressure_profile_text with the new format. Decompose assigns bTIEN pressure/fingerprint branch wiring to API-05-ai-coaching-mode-assignment (target_files include assignAiCoachingModes.ts); prototype classification.ts tradeoff/classification heuristics are brownfield paths outside API-03 target_files and API-02 classifyUser.ts OS resolver scope. API-04 depends_on needs pressure profile step completion, not legacy string equality; Protector/Stabilizer branches should be keyed off high-intensity presence or shared helper in API-05.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, all ACs pass, no blockers. Deferred: C-1 multi-high join-order parity (buildPressureProfile follow-on patch); C-2 legacy "System Overload" consumer updates to API-05-ai-coaching-mode-assignment (assignAiCoachingModes.ts) and prototype classification.ts brownfield integration.
